top_signals.title: SK Hynix is set to make its Wall Street debut. Will that narrow the chipmaker's 'Korea discount'?
top_signals.summary: As global chip giant SK Hynix makes its Nasdaq debut Friday, the listing serves as a major test of whether the company can shed its long standing "Korea Discount."

top_signals.title: Deep-sea mining threatens 60% of vent species: IUCN
top_signals.summary: Rare molluscs that could advance medicine and technology are increasingly at risk as seabed mineral extraction expands.

top_signals.title: Ostapenko, Arevalo fight back to win Wimbledon mixed doubles title
top_signals.summary: "I was ⁠frustrated after losing ​my serve in the first ​set, but I calmed myself down ​and ‌told myself to keep fighting until the last point," said Jelena Ostapenko.
